name: Lime Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Optional: Fresh Strawberries and Lime slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crust ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Press the crumb mixture evenly over the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 5 to 6 minutes, then let cool completely.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until light and fluffy. Gradually add 3/4 cup sugar, beating well after each addition.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in the grated lime rind, key lime juice, and vanilla extract.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 45 minutes, or until set.
7. In another bowl, combine the sour cream and 3 tablespoons sugar; stir well.
8. Spread the mixture evenly over the cheesecake.
9. Bake at 500°F (260°C) for 5 minutes.
10. Let cool to room temperature on a wire rack, then chill in the refrigerator for at least 8 hours before serving.
11. To serve, carefully remove the sides of the springform pan. If desired, garnish with fresh strawberries and lime slices.
Yield: One 9-inch cheesecake.
